case_title: LA REINA D. AMBEGIA VS. CATHY JEAN SHOES, INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMBEGIA, LA REINA D. AS TO DEFENDANT CATHY JEAN SHOES, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
